steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
To find $f(2)$, substitute $2$ for $x$ in the function, then evaluate the resulting expression.
$$f(2)=3\cdot4^2$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
First evaluate the exponent, then multiply.
$$4^2=16$$
$$3\cdot16=48$$
The answer is C.
